channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Stanford AI expert’s credibility shattered by fake, AI-created sources: judge
item.description: Hancock, a prolific, high-profile researcher whose work has received some $20 million in grant support over the past two decades, charged $600 an hour to prepare the testimony the judge tossed.
item.dc:creator: Ethan Baron, The Mercury News

item.title: Fox will stream next month's Super Bowl for free on Tubi
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Fox will stream the Super Bowl on Tubi for the first time, giving streamers and cord cutters a chance to watch the big game on Feb. 9 for free. Tubi was acquired by Fox Corporation in 2020. It is a free, ad-supported streaming service.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Chinese cars are close to a US ban – and that could make EVs a lot more expensive
item.description: As part of a crackdown on vehicle software and hardware from China, the Biden Administration has finalized its rules for banning Chinese EVs in the US market.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Microsoft adds ‘pay-as-you-go’ access for AI agents with M365 Copilot Chat
item.description: Microsoft has added a “pay-as-you-go” option to access AI agents alongside its free M365 Copilot Chat plan.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: The new app that is an essential tool for tracking California wildfires
item.description: Frustrated by available information about wildfires, Healdsburg's John Mill built Watch Duty to change that.
item.dc:creator: Lisa M. Krieger, The Mercury News

item.title: Africa’s digital economy and digital transformation
item.description: With rich resources like a growing physical infrastructure and subsea cable network, Africa is uniquely positioned to emerge as a leader among today’s developing economies.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Mark Zuckerberg hosting reception for Trump
item.description: Meta CEO Mark Zuckerburg is co-hosting a black tie reception Jan. 20 after President-elect Trump’s inauguration to celebrate the Republican's win. The tech giant teamed up with Houston Rockets owner Tilman Fertita, who is set to become the new U.S.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, The Hill

item.title: Mac malware mayhem as 100 million Apple users at risk of having personal data stolen
item.description: New Mac malware variant targets browser credentials and personal data, researchers find. Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson gives tips to safeguard your Mac from the latest malware threats.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Netflix's Apple Cider Vinegar trailer teases a funny psychopathic-influencer thriller that I can't wait to watch
item.description: Netflix's new series is set in the early days of social media influencers, and features a delusional wellness guru.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: President Biden signs executive order to open up federal land to speed up AI data center construction
item.description: DoD and DoE set to identify “frontier AI data center” locations with high compute power and clean energy.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Friendship ended with Overwatch 2 as Marvel Rivals developer promises a new hero every six weeks
item.description: Marvel Rivals is set to receive plenty of balance changes with the launch of Season 1, NetEase confirms.
item.dc:creator: dash.wood@futurenet.com (Dashiell Wood), TechRadar

item.title: Tekken 8's winter update brings the nerf hammer down on Final Fantasy 16 guest character Clive Rosfield
item.description: It's bad news for Clive mains in the latest Tekken 8 update, but at least there are some good practice and customization improvements.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Rápido o lento: el impacto real de la velocidad de adopción de la IA
item.description: Existen muchas razones para adoptar un enfoque lento y cuidadoso en lo relativo a la inteligencia artificial (IA) generativa. La tecnología está cambiando rápidamente, por lo que invertir mucho dinero en la plataforma incorrecta podría terminar costando mucho dinero.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: 5 ways to avoid AI in Windows
item.description: Generative AI (genAI) is seemingly everywhere these days — and Windows is certainly no exception. The OS itself now has Copilot on its taskbar, and new PCs ship with a dedicated Copilot AI key on their keyboards.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: These top online AI courses can help advance your career
item.description: Demand for generative AI (genAI) courses is surging, passing all other tech skills courses and spanning fields from data science to cybersecurity, project management, and marketing.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: An eye-opening Android privacy blacklight
item.description: One of the most prickly misconceptions around Android is that it’s completely incompatible with privacy.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Mark Zuckerberg will cohost reception with Republican billionaires for Trump inauguration
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg is cohosting a reception with billionaire Republican donors next week for Donald Trump’s inauguration, the latest sign of the Facebook founder's embrace of the president-elect.
item.dc:creator: ZEKE MILLER and COLLEEN LONG, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Biden signs ambitious order to bolster energy resources for AI data centers
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — President Joe Biden on Tuesday signed an ambitious executive order on artificial intelligence that seeks to ensure the infrastructure needed for advanced AI operations, such as large-scale data centers and new clean power facilities, can be built quickly and at scale in the United
item.dc:creator: SARAH PARVINI, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: A possible TikTok ban is just days away. A list of other apps available
item.description: With a possible TikTok ban just days away, many U.S. users are looking for alternative social media platforms to help them keep up with pop culture or provide the type of entertaining videos that popularized the short-form video app.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: US TikTok users flock to Chinese app Xiaohongshu in protest with TikTok ban looming
item.description: HONG KONG (AP) — As the threat of a TikTok ban looms, U.S. TikTok users are flocking to the Chinese social media app Xiaohongshu – making it the top downloaded app in the U.S.
item.dc:creator: ZEN SOO, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Inside the DHS Science and Technology Directorate’s search for better wireless communications
item.description: The Homeland Security Department's Science and Technology Directorate has an ongoing research program for the development of cellular. The post Inside the DHS Science and Technology Directorate’s search for better wireless communications first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Tom Temin, Federal News Network

item.title: Prime Video's use of AI, Next Gen Stats on NFL games is helping viewers understand the game better
item.description: CULVER CITY, Calif. (AP) — The Los Angeles Rams defense appeared to be content to drop back in coverage and prevent San Francisco’s Brock Purdy from completing a Hail Mary on the final play of their Thursday night game on Dec. 12. The broadcast on Amazon Prime Video saw it differently, though.
item.dc:creator: JOE REEDY, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: TikTok gets frosty reception at Supreme Court in fight to stave off ban
item.description: TikTok received a frosty reception in its fight to save the platform at the Supreme Court, which during oral arguments Friday expressed sympathy with the government’s national security concerns about the platform’s ties to China.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, NewsNation

item.title: Why JavaScript’s still on top in 2025
item.description: Welcome to a new year of programming and the brand new monthly list of JavaScript stories just for developers! Among the highlights so far: Svelte and SvelteKit have seen a slew of incremental improvements, Astro.js 5.0 just hit, and the Next.js team is working on a composable caching mechanism.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: How to easily print photos from your phone
item.description: Most cameras allow you to instantly transfer images from a camera to a smartphone via Bluetooth, and you can print photos directly from your phone.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: From AI assistants to holographic displays, automakers showcase in-cabin experiences at CES
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Interior lighting aimed at reducing motion sickness. Shiny holographic dashboards displayed on windshields. And AI-powered voice assistants paired with infotainment systems to keep you company on long drives.
item.dc:creator: WYATTE GRANTHAM-PHILIPS, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Rubrik heralds in new era of federal cyber recovery and resilience
item.description: The company's Rubrik Security Cloud - Government is now FedRAMP-authorized, streamlining access to cyber recovery and resiliency capabilities. The post Rubrik heralds in new era of federal cyber recovery and resilience first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: wfedstaff, Federal News Network

item.title: Meloni says Italy is exploring deals on telecoms security, but denies private talks with Musk
item.description: ROME (AP) — Italy’s Premier Giorgia Meloni said Thursday that her government is in talks with several private companies, including Elon Musk’s SpaceX, over the country’s telecoms security system, but denied having discussed the issue privately with Musk. “I never talked about this with Musk.
item.dc:creator: GIADA ZAMPANO, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Meta tries letting Facebook Marketplace users view eBay listings as way to resolve EU charges
item.description: Meta said Wednesday that it will allow some Facebook users to view eBay listings on its Marketplace service, as it tries out a possible way to resolve European Union charges of anticompetitive behavior that the bloc leveled last year.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, KRON4
